name: Meitu Acrylic Distemper Interior Wall Paints
file: Meitu Acrylic Distemper Interior Wall Paints.webp
leadtext: Meitu Distemper is a traditional water-based interior wall paint that produces a soft, chalky matte finish. Historically made from chalk, lime, and pigment, modern distempers (like acrylic distemper) are water-based and more eco-friendly than some synthetic paints, with low odour and good breathability. It’s usually less durable and less washable than modern emulsions, so it’s best for low-traffic areas, ceilings, or budget-friendly projects. Distemper gives a classic, subtle texture and is easy to apply, but doesn’t handle moisture or frequent cleaning as well as contemporary interior emulsions.
